message:
refactor(build): complete C to Zig migration in runtime.zig

- Remove frozen_functions.c generation in edgeboxc build flow
- Extract closure manifest to separate JSON file (closure_manifest.json)
- Update patch_closure_hooks.js to read from JSON instead of parsing C
- Generate Zig stub for empty frozen module on freeze failure
- Remove dead code: universal_compiler.zig (unused edgebox-compile tool)
- Remove universal-compiler build target from build.zig

The entire freeze/codegen pipeline now uses Zig exclusively.
No C code is generated or linked for frozen functions.
